recommendation: Fix the machine before widening product scope.
cost_principles: Use cheaper coding tiers by default, but only after blueprint ambiguity is removed.
Do not spend strong-model tokens to hide weak blueprint quality.
Convert repeated repair families into shared prevention helpers.
resource_risks: Repeated false-green loops waste founder attention.
Repeated repair without carry-forward wastes model spend.
decision: Proceed with closure blueprint creation; hold execution for architect comparison.
